name: Bitwarden Password Manager MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Bitwarden — the open-source password manager and secrets manager. Enables AI agents to interface with Bitwarden Secrets Manager (not personal vault) for managing application secrets, API keys, and credentials. Bitwarden Secrets Manager is the enterprise-grade secrets management product distinct from the personal password manager.
use_cases: Retrieving application secrets from Bitwarden Secrets Manager for deployment agents
Managing secret rotation and updates from infrastructure automation agents
Auditing secret access and usage patterns from security governance agents
Syncing secrets across environments from DevOps workflow agents
not_for: Personal password vault management (security risk for autonomous agent access)
High-volume secret retrieval at millisecond latency
best_when: An organization using Bitwarden Secrets Manager wants AI agents to retrieve application credentials and manage the secrets lifecycle — without exposing full vault access.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Password and secrets management is critical security infrastructure. Personal vault access for AI agents creates extreme security risk. Use Secrets Manager API only, not personal vault API.

auth.notes: Bitwarden Secrets Manager machine account access tokens. Scoped per project. Never use personal Bitwarden vault API for agent access — use Secrets Manager only.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Bitwarden Secrets Manager free tier for small teams
pricing.notes: Bitwarden Password Manager is free/low cost. Secrets Manager has its own pricing tier. Open source for self-hosting.

performance.rate_limits: Bitwarden API rate limits apply per account

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Critical security infrastructure — secrets must never be logged
Use Secrets Manager machine account tokens ONLY — never personal vault API for agents
Community MCP implementation — verify against official Bitwarden SDK
Self-hosted Bitwarden requires separate server configuration for Secrets Manager
EU and US data center options — verify data residency for compliance requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Password and secrets management. NEVER use personal vault API for agents. SOC2 and GDPR. Scoped machine account tokens. Self-hosting option.

security_score_components.security_notes: Password management infrastructure. Highest security posture required. SOC2 and GDPR. Machine account tokens only. Self-hosting available.
